auth.logoAlt: Compra Mais — Rio Branco · Public Procurement Digital System · Transparency, Trust, Efficiency, Partnership

signup.title: Supplier registration
signup.subtitle: Enter the company's Tax ID (CNPJ). The data is automatically validated with the Federal Revenue Service.
signup.loading: Looking up data at the Federal Revenue Service…
signup.manualLink: Federal Revenue Service unavailable? Fill in manually
signup.consent: I authorize the processing of my data for accreditation purposes, in accordance with the LGPD.

errors.cnpjInvalido: Invalid CNPJ. Check the numbers you entered.
errors.situacao: CNPJ with a non-active registration status — registration not allowed.
errors.cnpjDuplicado: This CNPJ is already registered. Use account recovery.
errors.emailDuplicado: This e-mail is already in use. Sign in or use another e-mail.
errors.generico: Could not complete the registration. Please try again.

signup.statusNote: Your account will start with the Applicant status.

login.title: Access the platform
login.subtitle: Sign in with your registered e-mail and password.

reset.title: Recover password
reset.subtitle: Enter your registered e-mail. If an account exists, we'll send a link to reset your password.
reset.erro: Could not send the link. Please try again.
reset.enviadoInfo: If the e-mail has an account, you'll receive a link to reset your password shortly.

redefinir.title: Set a new password
redefinir.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
redefinir.erroToken: Invalid or expired link. Please request a new password recovery.
redefinir.erroFraca: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
redefinir.erroGenerico: Could not reset the password. Please try again.
redefinir.sucessoInfo: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with the new password.

credenciamentoEdital.semEditais: No open notices at the moment.
credenciamentoEdital.vazioDica: No company with a compatible CNAE for this notice.

distribuicao.semEditais: No published notice available for distribution.
distribuicao.vazioDica: There are no accepted credentials yet to allocate this notice's demand.
distribuicao.deficitAviso: Supply shortfall: the declared capacity ({{distribuido}}) does not cover the demand ({{total}}). Uncovered balance: {{deficit}}.

reserva.avisoTexto: Suppliers approved after the initial distribution are placed here without changing the quotas already distributed. They will be called in chronological order if a holder fails to deliver.
reserva.erroCarregar: Could not load the reserve list.
reserva.vazioDica: Suppliers approved after the initial distribution will appear here, in chronological order.

desistencias.subtitulo: Record of suppliers who declined assigned quotas
desistencias.vazioDica: When a holder supplier declines a quota, the record appears here and the next in the reserve queue is triggered automatically.

setoresIndustriais.erroCarregar: Could not load the sectors. Check your permissions.
setoresIndustriais.vazioDica: Click "New sector" to add the first one.

modal.subtitulo: Fill in the fields and save
modal.avisoHistorico: Records are never permanently deleted — deletion converts to Inactive, preserving the notices that already required the code.
modal.erroSalvar: Could not save. Check the CNAE code (7 digits) and the description.

tiposArquivos.erroCarregar: Could not load file types. Check your permissions.
tiposArquivos.vazioDica: Click "New type" to add the first one.

modal.subtitulo: Fill in the fields and save
modal.obrigatorioAjuda: Highlights this document as required in Step 2 of registration (does not block submission).
modal.avisoHistorico: Records are never permanently deleted — deletion converts to Inactive, preserving historical links (notices and uploads).
modal.erroSalvar: Could not save. Check the document, format and category.

perfis.subtitulo: Choose which Admin Panel screens each role can see. The Administrator's own access is editable too, but they never lose this screen.
perfis.erro: Could not save. Check your permissions.

emConstrucao.corpo: This feature is not implemented yet. The item already appears in the menu and in Screen access by role.

fornecedores.subtitulo: Local companies registered on the platform.
fornecedores.buscaPlaceholder: Search by tax ID or legal name…
fornecedores.novoFornecedorIndisponivel: Registration is done by the supplier itself (self-registration).
fornecedores.capProdutivaIndisponivel: Capacity is declared per notice (not a supplier attribute).
fornecedores.erroCarregar: Could not load suppliers. Check your permissions.
fornecedores.vazioDica: Adjust the search or filters to see other results.
fornecedores.erroSalvarContato: Could not save. Check the fields.

acao.bloquearIndisponivel: Debt-based blocking is handled in the accreditation module (RN002).

modal.subtituloCriar: Fill in the fields and save
modal.subtituloVerEditar: Official data is read-only; edit the contact details.
modal.avisoHistorico: Records are never permanently deleted — deletion converts to Inactive or Blocked, preserving history.
modal.erroCriar: Could not register. Check the tax ID and required fields.

sincResultado.revisao: Data updated — status requires CPL review.

secretarias.erroCarregar: Could not load the departments. Check your permissions.
secretarias.vazioDica: Click "New record" to add the first one.

modal.subtitulo: Fill in the fields and save
modal.avisoHistorico: Records are never permanently deleted — deletion converts them to Inactive or Blocked, preserving history.
modal.erroSalvar: Could not save. Check the required fields and the e-mail.

covalidacao.vazio: No documents for the current filters.

gerirEditais.vazioDica: Create the first notice to start operations.
gerirEditais.vazioFiltroDica: Adjust the search or filters to see more results.
gerirEditais.buscaAriaLabel: Search notices by number or subject
gerirEditais.novoSub: Fill in the fields and save
gerirEditais.softDeleteNota: Records are never permanently deleted — deletion converts them to Inactive or Blocked, preserving history.

itens.subtitulo: Register the items of edital {{numero}} from the goods and services catalog. Available while the edital is a draft.
itens.erroAdicionar: Could not add. Check the fields (item already included, invalid unit or price).
itens.vazio: No items registered for this edital yet.
itens.notaPreco: The ceiling price is for internal administration use and is not shown on the public transparency portal.

gerirEditais.editarSub: Adjust edital {{numero}} (available while it is a draft).

contestacoes.subtitulo: Accept (corrects the tender) or reject (with a reason) the challenges.

auditoria.subtitulo: Query and export of the append-only trail (read-only).
auditoria.vazio: No records for the current filters.

catalogos.subtitulo: Maintain CNAE sectors, document types and the goods and services catalog. Deletion is logical: an inactivated item leaves the lists but keeps its links.

campos.unidadesDica: Select one or more registered units.
campos.simboloDica: E.g.: un, kg, m², L, h, cx
campos.unidadesVazio: No units registered. Add them in the "Units of measure" tab.

catalogos.erroCriar: Could not save. Check whether the key already exists or the fields are valid.
catalogos.buscaPlaceholder: Search by number, name or specification…
catalogos.confirmarExcluir: Permanently delete "{{nome}}"? This action cannot be undone.

usuarios.vazioDica: Use “New user” to register the first staff member.
usuarios.erroReset: Could not reset. Check the password (min. 8).

modal.subtitulo: The position defines the access profile (RBAC). Deletion is logical: a deactivated user cannot sign in, but their action history is preserved.
modal.erroSalvar: Could not save. Check the data (e-mail/login already in use, position and password).

malote.subtitulo: Consolidate a supplier's approved documents into an ordered dossier (Company ID → Personal → Attachments → Certificates) optimized for SEI upload. Generation is asynchronous and durable; an indivisible piece above the limit is flagged for manual handling.
malote.vazioDica: Generate a package from a supplier's approved documents.

modal.subtitulo: The legal order (Company ID → Personal → Attachments → Certificates) and fragmentation by the SEI limit are applied automatically on generation.

gerar.enviado: Generation requested — processing in the background.
gerar.erro: Could not request generation. Check the fields and your access role.

lista.acimaLimite: Piece above the limit — handle manually

sei.consultarSub: Query a SEI process by number and see its documents.
sei.erroConsulta: Could not query. Check the number, or SEI may be unavailable.
sei.naoConfigurado: SEI integration is not configured. Set SEI_BASE_URL and the SEI credentials (user, password, department and process type) to enable sending and querying.

analiseDocumental.erroCarregar: Could not load the review queue.

modal.label: Rejection justification
modal.placeholder: Describe the reason (e.g., unreadable image, expired document, divergent data…). The supplier will see this justification.
modal.aviso: The justification is mandatory and is recorded in the audit trail (RN003).

erros.rede: Connection failed. Check your internet and try again.
erros.RBAC: You don't have permission for this action.
erros.NAO_AUTENTICADO: Session expired. Please sign in again.
erros.CredenciamentoDuplicado: You already have an active accreditation for this notice.
erros.EditalNaoAberto: This notice is not open for accreditation.
erros.EditalIncompativel: Your company is not eligible for this notice (incompatible CNAE).
erros.CapacidadeInvalida: Enter a valid capacity: a whole number greater than zero.
erros.TermoIncompleto: The acceptance term could not be recorded. Please try again.
erros.TransicaoCredenciamentoInvalida: This action is not allowed in the accreditation's current state.
erros.CredenciamentoJaDistribuido: This accreditation has already been distributed and cannot be canceled.
erros.SenhaFraca: The new password doesn't meet the security requirements.
erros.TokenResetInvalido: Reset link is invalid or expired.
erros.ApenasTitularConvida: Only the account holder can invite attorneys.
erros.ApenasTitularGere: Only the account holder can manage attorneys.
erros.LGPDTitular: Only the data subject can exercise this right.
erros.DescarteRetido: Disposal blocked: the data is still under legal retention.
erros.MotivoRecusaObrigatorio: Please provide a reason for the rejection.
erros.TransicaoInvalida: This operation isn't allowed in the current state.
erros.MaterialVinculadoAEdital: Item is linked to an edital and cannot be deleted.
erros.MaterialAtivoNaoExcluivel: Only inactive items can be deleted. Inactivate it first.
erros.EditalComCredenciamentos: This edital has associated credenciamentos and cannot be unpublished.
erros.EditalNaoEditavel: The edital can only be edited while it is a draft.

contestacao.semEmpresa: No company linked to your account.
contestacao.subtitulo: Resolve the issues blocking your accreditation and follow the reviews in progress.

busca.placeholder: Search by notice number or title…

vazio.descricao: Open an available notice and click “Start Accreditation” to begin.

acao.erro: Could not complete. Please try again.

credenciamento.retomado: We picked your application up where you left off.
credenciamento.erroGenerico: This step could not be completed. Please try again.

capacidade.descricao: Enter the maximum amount your company can deliver. The system uses this number as the ceiling in the mathematical allocation — you never receive demand above your capacity.
capacidade.label: Maximum capacity (sets)
capacidade.dica: You may declare any value up to the total demand of the notice. Companies with lower capacity still compete normally in the allocation.
capacidade.teto1: Your declared capacity becomes the maximum limit of items that can be allocated to your company.
capacidade.teto2: The notice's demand is divided among the eligible suppliers, respecting each one's ceiling.
capacidade.teto3: The unmet balance goes to the Reserve Registry, triggered in a 2nd demand.

documentos.descricao: Valid documents submitted in previous notices are reused automatically. You only need to attach what is missing.
documentos.listaVazia: No document types configured in the catalog.
documentos.semPendentes: All required documents are already in your repository and are reused automatically.
documentos.arraste: Select a file (PDF, JPG or PNG)
documentos.limite: PDF, JPG or PNG · up to 10 MB
documentos.validadeObrigatoria: Please provide this document's validity date.
documentos.erroFormato: Invalid format. Accepted: PDF, JPG or PNG.
documentos.erroEnviar: The document could not be uploaded. Please try again.

termo.descricao: By finishing, you sign the Terms of Acceptance of the application. The acceptance is recorded in the audit trail with purpose, version and date.
termo.resumo: I declare that the information and documents submitted are true and I agree to the notice's participation conditions, under Complementary Law 123 and the Compra Mais program rules.
termo.checkbox: I have read and accept the Terms of Acceptance of the application.

enviado.descricao: Your application has been submitted to the Bidding Committee.
enviado.baixarPdfErro: Could not generate the receipt. Please try again.

documentos.semEmpresa: No company linked to your account. Complete your registration to submit documents.
documentos.subtituloPagina: Your company's central repository. Automatically reused in new tenders.
documentos.formatosAceitos: Accepted formats: PDF, JPG or PNG.
documentos.alertaPendencias_one: {{count}} document needs attention. Resolve the documents below to keep participating in tenders.
documentos.alertaPendencias_other: {{count}} documents need attention. Resolve the documents below to keep participating in tenders.
documentos.reenvioSucesso: Document resent. The CPL will review it again.
documentos.listaVazia: No documents sent yet. Use the button above to send the first one.
documentos.uploadSucesso: Document sent. The CPL will review it.
documentos.erroBaixar: Could not download the document. Please try again.

modalUpload.subtitulo: Choose the type, the file and the validity (if any).
modalUpload.arquivoAjuda: PDF, JPG or PNG — up to {{mb}} MB.
modalUpload.validadeAjuda: Leave blank for documents without an expiry date.
modalUpload.erroFormato: Unsupported format. Send PDF, JPG or PNG.
modalUpload.erroEnviar: Could not send the document. Please try again.

transparencia.subtituloPagina: Distribution is equal among eligible suppliers and always limited to your declared capacity (cap). See the public aggregates of the Compra Mais program below.

vitrine.subtitulo: Only bids compatible with your company's CNAE codes. 1 bid = 1 demand.
vitrine.vazioTitulo: No bids compatible with your line of business at the moment.
vitrine.vazioDica: We'll notify you when a compatible bid becomes available.
vitrine.vazioBuscaDica: Adjust the search or the department filter.
vitrine.bannerCnae: Filtering by <1>CNAE {{cnae}}</1>. Notices from other segments are not shown here.

contestarCnae.sucesso: Contest submitted — please await the Department's review.

estado.semEmpresa: No company linked to your session.

alertaErro.descricao: Expired documents: {{tipos}}. Notices requiring these documents stay blocked until they are renewed.

alertaAtencao.descricao: The {{tipo}} document expires in {{dias}} days ({{data}}). Renew it so you don't miss notices.

painelEditais.vazio: No compatible open notices at the moment.

painelCredenciamentos.vazio: You have no accreditations in progress.

minhaConta.subtitulo: Official company data obtained from the Federal Revenue Service (CNPJ API). Only Trade Name, Address and Phone can be edited.

sync.sucesso: Official data updated. Trade Name, Address and Phone were preserved.
sync.revisaoDetalhe: The CNPJ is no longer active at Receita. The data was updated and the case was forwarded to the CPL for review.

estado.erro: Could not load your account data.
estado.semEmpresa: Your account is not linked to a company.

responsavel.fotoErroTipo: Invalid format. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.
responsavel.fotoErro: Could not update the photo. Please try again.
responsavel.nomeErro: Could not save the name. Please try again.
responsavel.nomeObrigatorio: Enter at least the first name.
responsavel.erroFraca: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
responsavel.erroGenerico: Could not change the password. Please try again.
responsavel.sessaoExpirada: Your session has expired. Sign in again to change your password.

editaveis.salvarErro: Could not save. Please try again.

procuradores.subtitulo: Authorize third parties to act on behalf of the company, with an audit trail for every action.

convite.erro: Could not invite. Check the details and try again.
convite.dica: We'll send an invitation to link access to the company.

lista.vazioDica: Invite someone by e-mail or ID to act on behalf of the company.

removidos.subtitulo: Immutable record of revoked access, kept for auditing.

estado.semEmpresa: No company linked to your account.
estado.somenteTitular: Only the company's data subject can manage attorneys.

painelTitular.semEmpresa: No company linked to your account.
painelTitular.subtitulo: Consolidated pending items and your data subject rights (LGPD).

privacidade.subtitulo: Exercise your data subject rights (LGPD): access, correction and deletion. Handled by the Data Protection Officer (DPO).
privacidade.semSessao: Sign in as the data subject to exercise your rights.
privacidade.erro: We could not register your request. Please try again.

novo.detalhePlaceholder: Describe what you want to access, correct or delete.
novo.registrada: Request submitted. The DPO will review it.

feedback.retido: Disposal denied: data still under legal retention.
feedback.erro: The action could not be completed.

demandasDistribuidas.subtitulo: The split is equal among eligible suppliers and always capped at your declared capacity (ceiling).
demandasDistribuidas.vazioDica: As soon as a distribution runs on a tender where you are eligible, it will appear here.
demandasDistribuidas.semEmpresa: Sign in as a supplier to see your distributed demands.
demandasDistribuidas.reservaAviso: You completed your accreditation after the initial distribution. You were placed on the Reserve List (2nd Demand). Active contracts are not changed — you will be called automatically, in queue order, if a primary supplier fails to deliver.

meusCredenciamentos.subtitulo: Track all of your company’s accreditations and pick up where you left off.
meusCredenciamentos.semEmpresa: No company linked to your account.
meusCredenciamentos.vazioDica: Go to the Notices showcase and click “Start Accreditation” to begin.
meusCredenciamentos.vazioFiltroDica: Adjust the search or pick another status.

credenciamentoDetalhe.naoEncontradoDica: It may have been removed or does not belong to your company.
